readings.summary:
In the desert make ready the way of the Lord.

Note: Reading from Year A may be used as well.

readings.citation:
Ps 104:1b-2, 3-4, 24-25, 27-28, 29-30 (Year A option too!)
O bless the Lord, my soul.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 104:1b-2, 3-4, 24-25, 27-28, 29-30 (Year A option too!)
O bless the Lord, my soul.

readings.summary: The Holy Spirit descends on Jesus at his baptism.

antiphons.text:
After the Lord was baptized, the heavens were opened,
and the Spirit descended upon him like a dove,
and the voice of the Father thundered:
This is my beloved Son, with whom I am well pleased.

Behold the One of whom John said:
I have seen and testified that this is the Son of God.
